page: Microsoft Azure D2ps_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine belonging to the DPSv5 server family. It is powered by an Ampere Altra Neoverse-N1 processor operating at a clock speed of 3.0 GHz. The configuration includes 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) with a single thread per core, and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable for network-attached storage configurations.

Performance benchmarks indicate that the D2ps_v5 is positioned in the lower-tier performance bracket. While single-core stress-ng CPU performance and single-threaded gzip compression achieve average ratings, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are generally weak to poor. For instance, the Geekbench multi-core score is 2004.0, and the Passmark CPU score is 1586.72. Memory read-only large block bandwidth is measured at 23.96 GB/sec, and write bandwidth is 15.68 GB/sec. LLM inference speeds for a small 135M model reach 85.92 tokens per second for prompt processing and 28.26 tokens per second for text generation.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D2ps_v5 offers a low-cost entry point into dedicated ARM64 architecture without the overhead of hyperthreading. The absence of local storage and GPUs, combined with its modest memory and compute footprint, makes it suitable for lightweight, scale-out workloads. Appropriate applications include basic web serving, static content delivery, simple database operations, and development or testing environments that do not require high-performance vector extensions or intensive multi-threaded processing.
description: Microsoft Azure D2ps_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine from the DPSv5 family, featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Ampere Altra Neoverse-N1 processor running at 3.0 GHz. Equipped with 8.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core), this instance lacks local storage and onboard GPUs but supports Premium Storage. Benchmark data positions the server in the lower performance tier, with weak multi-core and memory bandwidth results, though it maintains average single-core CPU performance. The instance is a cost-efficient option for lightweight workloads that benefit from dedicated ARM64 cores without hyperthreading. It is best suited for basic web serving, static content delivery, simple database tasks, and lightweight development or testing environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2ps_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Ampere Altra vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage support, designed for lightweight general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2ps_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine with 2 dedicated Ampere Altra vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM for lightweight workloads.
tagline: An entry-level, dedicated ARM64 virtual machine designed for lightweight general-purpose workloads and cost-efficient development environments.
bullet_points: Powered by a 3.0 GHz Ampere Altra Neoverse-N1 ARMv8 processor
Features 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) with 8.0 GB of RAM
Lacks local storage but supports Premium Storage configurations
Delivers average single-core CPU performance with lower multi-core and memory bandwidth
Suitable for basic web serving, static content delivery, and lightweight database tasks
